MINI MINUTES: judge diane wick, clerk-beth wilber, reporter-candace yount: dept. 611, cause called for continued jury trial, carole cullum present for plaintiff, Larry richards pro per defendant not present, Judge Wick continues the trial, shortly after Judge Bryer from the Federal court calls Judge wick to inform her that there will be a stay placed on the trial while defendant waits for a ruling from the court re the Housing authority, Jury Trial Set for JAN-14-2005 Continued to JAN-18-2005 at 9:30 AM in 611

JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-12-2005 Continued To Jan-13-05 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 611
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 611, Judge Diane Wick, clerk-beth wilber: Mr. Richards was unable to appear for trial because the elevator in his hotel is broken. Ms. Cullum was present. Judge Wick speaks to Mr. Richards by phone and continues the jury trial until 9:30AM, 1/14/05. Judge Wick orders Mr. Richards present at that time and also orders him to have all his potential exhibits ready by 9AM, Thursday, 1/13/05. The Court orders Ms. Cullum to pick up Mr. Richards' exhibits and to bring them to Judge Wick no later than 10AM, 1/13/05, so the court can save some lost time by reviewing the evidence before trial resumes.
